summary: Built capsule-builder tool at tools/capsule-builder. Features: (1) Extract structured capsules from JSONL session files, (2) LLM-enhanced extraction with pattern-based fallback, (3) JSON and Markdown output formats, (4) Schema validation against session_capsule.v1.schema.json, (5) Health check and self-test modes. All tests passed: health check healthy, self-test passed.
